model:
(define-fun __need_malloc_and_calloc () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_FEATURE_HDPARM_HDIO_UNREGISTER_HWIF () Bool
  true)
(define-fun __USE_EXTERN_INLINES () Bool
  false)
(define-fun _STDLIB_H () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_FEATURE_HDPARM_HDIO_SCAN_HWIF () Bool
  true)
reasoning: 061fd0a353e.c L20: `if(!p)` at L20 in case 'U' — branch condition evaluates to garbage because `p` is declared at L7 (`char *p;`) but only assigned inside `case 'W':` when `r=1` (L16). If `r=0`, p is never assigned before case 'U' is evaluated. Known bug (// ERROR at L21). PC simplifies to CONFIG_FEATURE_HDPARM_HDIO_UNREGISTER_HWIF=T (all library macro variants — EXTERN, _STDLIB_H, __need_malloc_and_calloc — appear in both T/F forms and cancel out; SCAN_HWIF appears in both T/F). PC correctly constrained = UNREGISTER_HWIF=T (required to compile the case 'U' block at L19-23).
